_comments: CALIBRATION layout for OWCS VOD youtube 8C105lNzLAM (Crazy Raccoon vs
ZETA DIVISION, Champions Clash 2026 Upper Final). Calibrated against
REAL captured frames (t=360-390s) by locating the ult-charge chips
(orange = team A left, blue = team B right) and measuring the portrait
cell to their right: portrait = chip_x + 24px, y=46, 24x24 at 854x480,
uniform pitch 47.5px, B side mirrors A (854-18-46 = 790 = B5 chip).
Values below are those measurements scaled to 1920x1080 native
(x*2.2482, y*2.25); scale_layout_to_frame maps them back to any 16:9
slots_a = Crazy Raccoon (left/team A: HEESANG STALK3R JUNBIN CHORONG
VIGILANTE), slots_b = ZETA DIVISION (right/team B: KNIFE PROPER
MEALGARU VIOL2T SHU), each [x,y,w,h] px at 1920x1080, origin top-left,
tight to the portrait art. Portrait pitch ~106.8px.
anchor stays a PLACEHOLDER on purpose: the frame filter needs a
same-resolution template crop and is allowed to skip honestly until
one is cut; detection does not depend on it.
templates_dir points at this source's own template set
crops — the shared synthetic starter set in templates/ is untouched.

anchor._adjust: PLACEHOLDER — cut layouts/owcs_8c105lnzlam-anchor.png from a live-HUD region (e.g. the team nameplate) to activate the gameplay filter.
